Class Registration

java.lang.Object
com.github.shanebeee.skr.Registration
public class Registration extends Object
Registration for registering elements to Skript.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Registration.ConditionRegistrar
    Registrar for Conditions.
    class 
    Registration.EffectRegistrar
    Registrar for Effects.
    class 
    Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar<T extends Enum<T>>
    Registrar for Enum ClassInfos.
    class

    Registrar for Events.
    class

    Registrar for EventValues.

    Registrar for Expressions.

    Registar for Functions.
    class 
    Registration.PropertyConditionRegistrar
    Registrar for PropertyConditions.
    class 
    Registration.Registrar<T extends Registration.Registrar<T>>
    Base Registrar for all Skript element registrations.
    class 
    Registration.RegistryTypeRegistrar<T extends Keyed>
    Registrar for Registry ClassInfos.
    class

    Registrar for Sections.
    class

    class 
    Registration.TypeRegistrar<T>
    Registrar for ClassInfos.

      Parameters:
      eventClass - Event class to get event values for.
      Returns:
      List of event values.

    • newType

      public <T> Registration.TypeRegistrar<T> newType(Class<T> type, String codename)
      Get a new TypeRegistrar for a custom ClassInfo.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of class to register.
      Parameters:
      type - Class to register
      codename - Codename of new type
      Returns:
      New Type Registrar (Don't forget to register it!)

    • newEnumType

      public <T extends Enum<T>> Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar<T> newEnumType(Class<T> type, String codename)
      Create a new Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar for a custom EnumClassInfo.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of class to register.
      Parameters:
      type - Class to register
      codename - Codename of new type
      Returns:
      New EnumTypeRegistrar (Don't forget to register it!)

    • newEnumType

      public <T extends Enum<T>> Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar<T> newEnumType(Class<T> type, String codename, boolean plurals)
      Create a new Registration.EnumTypeRegistrar for a custom EnumClassInfo with a custom prefix and suffix.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of class to register.
      Parameters:
      type - Class to register
      codename - Codename of new type
      plurals - Whether to include plural forms of the enum names
      Returns:
      New EnumTypeRegistrar (Don't forget to register it!)

      eventClasses - Classes of the Events to register
      patterns - Patterns for the event
      Returns:
      New EventRegistrar (Don't forget to register it!)

    • newExpression

      public <T, E extends Expression<T>> Registration.ExpressionRegistrar<T,E> newExpression(Class<E> expressionClass, Class<T> returnType, Priority priority, String... patterns)
      Create a new ExpressionRegistrar for a custom Expression with patterns.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Return type of the expression
      E - Type of the expression
      Parameters:
      expressionClass - Class of the expression to register
      returnType - Return type of the expression
      priority - Priority of the expression
      patterns - Patterns to match for the expression
      Returns:
      ExpressionRegistrar for the custom expression

      Type Parameters:
      T - Return type of the expression
      E - Type of the expression
      Parameters:
      expressionClass - Class of the expression to register
      returnType - Return type of the expression
      property - Property name for the expression
      owner - Owner class for the expression

      ExpressionRegistrar for the custom expression

      patterns - Patterns to match for the structure

      StructureRegistrar for the custom structure

      Parameters:
      structureClass - Class of the structure to register
      entryValidator - Validator for structure entries
      patterns - Patterns to match for the structure
      Returns:
      StructureRegistrar for the custom structure

    • newFunction

      public <T> Registration.FunctionRegistrar<T> newFunction(DefaultFunction<T> function)
      Create a new FunctionRegistrar for a custom Function.
      Type Parameters:
      T - return type of the function
      Parameters:
      function - function to register
      Returns:
      FunctionRegistrar for the custom function

    • newEventValue

      public <F extends Event, T> Registration.EventValueRegistrar<F,T> newEventValue(Class<F> event, Class<T> value)
      Create a new EventValueRegistrar for a custom EventValue with event and value classes.
      Type Parameters:
      F - Type of the event
      T - Type of the value
      Parameters:
      event - Class of the event to register
      value - Class of the value to register
      Returns:
      EventValueRegistrar for the custom event value

    • finalizeRegistration

      public void finalizeRegistration()
      Finalize the registration process.
